# Vasudev Chemo Pharma
> ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturer and exporter of MEA Triazine 78% H2S scavengers
> and specialty chemicals. Based in Ankleshwar, Gujarat, India. Founded 2020.
> Exports to 14+ countries including UAE, Saudi Arabia, USA, Vietnam, and Brazil.

## Core Products
- [MEA Triazine 78% H2S Scavenger](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/mea-triazine-78-h2s-scavenger): CAS 4719-04-4, primary H2S scavenger for oil & gas, wastewater & biogas. Industrial grade, 78% active concentration.
- [MMA Triazine 40%](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/mma-triazine-40): Water treatment and biocide applications
- [Copper Sulphate](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/copper-sulphate): Agriculture & industrial grade
- [Manganese Sulphate](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/manganese-sulphate): Agriculture & industrial grade
- [Sodium Cumene Sulfonate 40%](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-cumene-sulfonate-40): Hydrotrope for detergent & cleaner formulations
- [Sodium Cumene Sulfonate 90%](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-cumene-sulfonate-90): High-purity powder hydrotrope
- [Sodium Xylene Sulfonate 40%](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-xylene-sulfonate-40): Liquid hydrotrope
- [Sodium Xylene Sulfonate 90%](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-xylene-sulfonate-90): Powder hydrotrope
- [All Products](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product)

## Technical Resources
- [How H2S Scavengers Work](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/how-h2s-scavengers-work): OSHA/NIOSH thresholds, reaction chemistry, dosing guidelines

- [Resources & Datasheets](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/resources): TDS, SDS, dosing guides

## Company
- Location: F-29, Plot No. 328/329, Near Asian Paint Circle, G.I.D.C, Ankleshwar, Gujarat 393002, India
- Certification: ISO 9001:2015
- Founded: 2020
- Products: 15+ industrial, specialty & surfactant chemicals
- Export Markets: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Iraq, Egypt, USA, Brazil, Vietnam, Thailand, China, Iran, Libya
